Part.Source:
Event Start
loadWWPContext.Call(&wwpContext) &EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod &PrimeiraLinha = 2
PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'IMPORTACAOCLIENTEXLS', 1, &wwpContext.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod)
&ColPesCod = val(Substr(&PadObs, 1, 8)) &ColPesRaz = val(Substr(&PadObs, 9, 8)) &ColPesGrpImp = val(Substr(&PadObs, 17, 8)) &ColPesCnpj = val(Substr(&PadObs, 25, 8)) &ColPesIns = val(Substr(&PadObs,33, 8)) &ColPesRg = val(Substr(&PadObs, 41, 8)) &ColPesCEP = val(Substr(&PadObs, 49, 8)) &ColPesLog = val(Substr(&PadObs, 57, 8)) &ColPesNro = val(Substr(&PadObs, 65, 8)) &ColPesBai = val(Substr(&PadObs, 73, 8)) &ColPesCpl = val(Substr(&PadObs, 81, 8)) &ColPesCidCod = val(Substr(&PadObs, 89, 8)) &ColPesEml = val(Substr(&PadObs, 97, 8)) &ColPesFon = val(Substr(&PadObs, 105, 8)) &ColPesCel = val(Substr(&PadObs, 113, 8)) &ColPesDtaNas = val(Substr(&PadObs, 121, 8)) &ColPesSuf = val(Substr(&PadObs, 129, 8)) &ColPesObs = val(Substr(&PadObs, 137, 8)) &ColPesUfeCod = val(Substr(&PadObs, 145, 8)) &ColIsCli = val(Substr(&PadObs, 153, 8)) &ColIsFor = val(Substr(&PadObs, 161, 8)) &ColIsTra = val(Substr(&PadObs, 169, 8)) &MostrarSomenteNaoCadastrado = Substr(&PadObs, 177, 1) &SemCpfSemCnpj = Substr(&PadObs, 178, 1) &ColCidIBGE = val(Substr(&PadObs, 179, 8))
&ColPesEml2 = val(Substr(&PadObs, 187, 8)) &ColPesEml3 = val(Substr(&PadObs, 195, 8))
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridSdtClienteXlss_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridSdtClienteXlss.InternalName GridSdtClienteXlss.Rows = Page.Rows GridSdtClienteXlssPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridSdtClienteXlss.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
GridSdtClienteXlss.Rows = 5
EndEvent
Event Refresh
TbLocalizados.Visible = (&sdtClienteXls.Count > 0)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&GridSdtClienteXlssCurrentPage = GridSdtClienteXlss.CurrentPage &GridSdtClienteXlssPageCount = GridSdtClienteXlss.PageCount SdtClienteXls__StsCadastro.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridSdtClienteXlss.Load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &Add.FromImage(ActionInsert) &Add.TooltipText = "Add Cliente."
&GravarDireto.FromImage(ActionAdiantar) &GravarDireto.TooltipText = "Gravar Direto"
Do Case Case &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.StsCadastro = !"N" SdtClienteXls__StsCadastro.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.StsCadastro = !"M" SdtClienteXls__StsCadastro.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Otherwise SdtClienteXls__StsCadastro.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridSdtClienteXlssPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridSdtClienteXlssPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' GridSdtClienteXlss.PreviousPage() Case GridSdtClienteXlssPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &PageToGo = GridSdtClienteXlss.CurrentPage &PageToGo += 1 GridSdtClienteXlss.GotoPage(&PageToGo) Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridSdtClienteXlssPaginationBar.SelectedPage) GridSdtClienteXlss.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridSdtClienteXlssPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridSdtClienteXlss.Rows = GridSdtClienteXlssPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue GridSdtClienteXlss.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoGravarTodos'
&Random = Random() * 10000000000 &ProgressId = 'GravaImportaCliente' + trim(Str(&Random))
scaProgressBar2.ProcessId = &ProgressId scaProgressBar2.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) scaProgressBar2.Start()
GravarTodosCliente.Submit(&ProgressID,&ProgressID, &sdtClienteXls, &wwpContext.EmpCod, &wwpContext.PesCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event scaProgressBar2.OnComplete
For Each ORder ProgressId Where ProgressId = &ProgressID &sdtClienteXls.FromJson(ProgressLogXml) Exit EndFor TbLocalizados.Visible = (&sdtClienteXls.Count > 0) ApagaProgress.Call(&ProgressId)
EndEvent
Event FileUpload1.UploadComplete
loadWWPContext.Call(&wwpContext) &EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod
Do Case Case &PrimeiraLinha = 0 msg('ATENÇÃO! Coluna código primeira Linha não pode ser vazio!')
Otherwise &sdtClienteXls.Clear()
For &FileUploadData in &FileUploadDataColl If not &FileUploadData.File.IsEmpty() &File.Source=&FileUploadData.File &selectedURL = &File.GetAbsoluteName() /// Pega o local temporario &File.Close()
&Random = Random() * 10000000000 &ProgressId = 'ImportaCliente' + trim(Str(&Random))
&PadObs = '' &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesCod),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesRaz),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesGrpImp),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesCnpj),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesIns),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesRg),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesCEP),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesLog),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesNro),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesBai),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesCpl),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesCidCod),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesEml),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesFon),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesCel),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesDtaNas),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesSuf),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesObs),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesUfeCod),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColIsCli),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColIsFor),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColIsTra),8,'0') &PadObs += &MostrarSomenteNaoCadastrado &PadObs += &SemCpfSemCnpj &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColCidIBGE),8,'0')
&PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesEml2),8,'0') &PadObs += PAdL(str(&ColPesEml3),8,'0')
PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'IMPORTACAOCLIENTEXLS', 1, &wwpContext.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod)
scaProgressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId scaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) scaProgressBar1.Start()
ImpClienteXLS.Submit(&ProgressID, &ProgressID, &EmpCod, &selectedURL, &PrimeiraLinha, &ColPesCod, &ColPesRaz,&ColPesCnpj,&ColPesIns,&ColPesRg,&ColPesSuf,&ColPesCel,&ColPesEml,&ColPesFon,&ColPesCEP,&ColPesLog,&ColPesNro,&ColPesBai,&ColPesCidCod,&ColPesUfeCod, &ColPesCpl,&ColPesObs, &ColCidIBGE,&MostrarSomenteNaoCadastrado, &SemCpfSemCnpj, &ColPesEml2, &ColPesEml3) EndIf endfor EndCase
&FileUploadDataColl.clear() FileUpload1.Clear()
EndEvent
Event scaProgressBar1.OnComplete
For Each ORder ProgressId Where ProgressId = &ProgressID &sdtClienteXls.FromJson(ProgressLogXml) Exit EndFor TbLocalizados.Visible = (&sdtClienteXls.Count > 0) ApagaProgress.Call(&ProgressId)
EndEvent
Event &Add.Click
&sdtPessoaItem = NEW() &sdtPessoaItem.PesRaz = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesRaz &sdtPessoaItem.PesBai = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesBai &sdtPessoaItem.PesLog = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesLog &sdtPessoaItem.PesNro = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesNro &sdtPessoaItem.PesFan = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesRaz If &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCnpj.Length() > 11 &sdtPessoaItem.PesTip = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA &sdtPessoaItem.PesCnpj = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCnpj Else &sdtPessoaItem.PesTip = TipoPessoa.FISICA &sdtPessoaItem.PesCpf = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCnpj EndIf &sdtPessoaItem.PesInsEst = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesInsEst &sdtPessoaItem.PesFonNum = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesFonNum &sdtPessoaItem.PesCep = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.Pescep &sdtPessoaItem.PesCidCod = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCIdCod &sdtPessoa.Add(&sdtPessoaItem) &webSession.Set('NOVAPESSOA',&sdtPessoa.ToXml())
wpNovaPessoa.Popup('CLI',0,'')
EndEvent
Event &GravarDireto.Click
If &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCnpj.Length() > 14 &PesTip = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA &PesCnpj = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCnpj Else &PesTip = TipoPessoa.FISICA &PesCpf = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCnpj EndIf
carregaCadastroPessoa.Call(&wwpContext.EmpCod, &wwpContext.PesCod, &SdtGravaPessoa)
// &ColPesGrpImp = val(Substr(&PadObs, 17, 8)) // &ColPesCnpj = val(Substr(&PadObs, 25, 8)) // &ColPesEml = val(Substr(&PadObs, 97, 8)) // &ColPesFon = val(Substr(&PadObs, 105, 8)) // &ColPesCel = val(Substr(&PadObs, 113, 8)) // &ColPesDtaNas = val(Substr(&PadObs, 121, 8)) // &ColPesObs = val(Substr(&PadObs, 137, 8)) // &ColPesUfeCod = val(Substr(&PadObs, 145, 8)) // &ColIsCli = val(Substr(&PadObs, 153, 8)) // &ColIsFor = val(Substr(&PadObs, 161, 8)) // &ColIsTra = val(Substr(&PadObs, 169, 8))
if &ColPesRaz > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesRaz = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesRaz Endif
if &ColPesCidCod > 0 and &ColPesUfeCod > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesCidCod = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCIdCod Endif
if &ColPesIns > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesInsEst = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesInsEst &SdtGravaPessoa.PesCadPro = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCadPro Endif
if &ColPesRg > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesRg = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesRg Endif if &PesTip = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA &SdtGravaPessoa.PesCnpj = &PesCnpj Else &SdtGravaPessoa.PesCpf = &PesCpf Endif &SdtGravaPessoa.PesTip = &PesTip
if &ColPesSuf > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesSuf = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesSuf Endif //Endereço if &ColPesLog > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesLog = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesLog Endif If &ColPesNro > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesNro = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesNro EndIf if &ColPesBai > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesBai = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesBai Endif if &ColPesCEP > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesCep = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.Pescep Endif if &ColPesCpl > 0 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesCpl = &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.pesCpl Endif
//Contato &SdtGravaPessoa.Fone.Clear() &SdtGravaPessoa.Email.Clear()
// if not &sdtClienteXlsItem.PesFonNum.IsEmpty() // &SdtGravaPessoaFone = new() // &SdtGravaPessoaFone.PesFonNums = &sdtClienteXlsItem.PesFonNum // &SdtGravaPessoa.Fone.Add(&SdtGravaPessoaFone) // Endif // if not &sdtClienteXlsItem.PesCelNum.IsEmpty() // &SdtGravaPessoaFone = new() // &SdtGravaPessoaFone.PesFonNums = &sdtClienteXlsItem.PesCelNum // &SdtGravaPessoa.Fone.Add(&SdtGravaPessoaFone) // Endif // // if not &sdtClienteXlsItem.PesEmail.IsEmpty() // &SdtGravaPessoaEmail = new() // &SdtGravaPessoaEmail.PesEmls = &sdtClienteXlsItem.PesEmail // &SdtGravaPessoa.Email.Add(&SdtGravaPessoaEmail) // Endif
if &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCod.IsEmpty() &SdtGravaPessoa.PesFan = &PesFan &SdtGravaPessoa.PesRazNF = &PesRazNF
&SdtGravaPessoa.OriCod = OrigemCadastroPessoa.IMPORTACAO_EXTERNA
&SdtGravaPessoa.PesIsCli = 1 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesIsFor = false &SdtGravaPessoa.PesIsFun = false &SdtGravaPessoa.PesIsVen = false &SdtGravaPessoa.PesIsTra = false
&SdtGravaPessoa.RatCod = 1 &SdtGravaPessoa.PesGruImpCod = 1
&SdtGravaPessoa.PesEmpCodSec = &PesEmpCodSec &SdtGravaPessoa.PesDtaVctCer = &PesDtaVctCer &SdtGravaPessoa.PesEscCtbCod = &PesEscCtbCod
&SdtGravaPessoa.PesCliCrd = &PesCliCrd
GravaCadastroPessoa.Call('ADD',&wwpContext.EmpCod, 0, &SdtGravaPessoa, &wwpContext.PesCod, &AuxPesCod) &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCod = &AuxPesCod Else //ATUALIZA GravaCadastroPessoa.Call('UPD',&wwpContext.EmpCod, &sdtClienteXls.CurrentItem.PesCod, &SdtGravaPessoa, &wwpContext.PesCod, &AuxPesCod) Endif
EndEvent
